content.body:
Extends TreeSitterASTExtractor with Python and Ruby grammar support via
smacker/go-tree-sitter. Extracts class/def (Python) and class/module/method
(Ruby) top-level symbols as EXTRACTED fact drafts.

Fixture files testdata/sample.py and testdata/sample.rb added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add Python and Ruby AST extraction
